titleStmt.title: SII 40.48: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 48. (A.R. No. B. 27 of 1930.) Pedda Gārlapāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the Sītārāmasvāmi temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1766, Krōdhi, Vaiśākha, śu. 15.

States that the temple of Sītārāmasvāmi at Peda-Gārlapāḍu, which had been constructed by Gārlapāṭi Sēshāchalam of Takkeḷḷapāḍu had fallen into disuse on account of the famine in the year Nandana and that his sons Lakshmīnārāyaṇa and Subbayya reconstructed the temple and procured the old images, consecrated them and obtained some lands as inam in the villages of Būdavāḍa, Gōgulapāḍu and Peda-Gārlapāḍu in the Palnad taluk, for conducting daily worship.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī sītārāmasvāmī
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbu
lu 1766 Agunēṭi krōdhi nāma saṁvatsara vaiśāgha(kha)
śu 15 lu śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭi brahmāṁḍanāyakulai
na peddagārlapāṭilō vijayaṁ cēsi vuṁḍē śrī sītārāma
svāmivārini pūrvaṁ takkeḷlapāṭilō gārlapāṭi śēṣāca
laṁgāri valla pratiṣṭaṁpaṁbaḍi naivēdya dīpārādhanalu vutsavā
dulu jarigiṁcucuṁḍagā naṁdana saṁvatsara kṣāmamuku ni
tyatadiyārādhanalu jaragaka Aṁtarvu paḍinaṁduna ti
rgi śuklayajuśyākhādhyayana niratulunnu kāśyapasa gōtrō
dbhavulunnu neccaṁ rājugāri pautṛlunnu paina vaccina śēṣā
calaṁgāri putrulunnu Ayina gārlapāṭi lakṣmīnārā
yaṇa subbayyagārivallapedagārlapāṭilō puna
rdevālayaṁ kaṭṭiṁci pūrvagrāma vigrahamulu te
cci saṁprōkṣaṇa cēyiṁci naivēdya dīpārādhanalu
vutsavādulu modalayinavi jaragagalaṁdulakugā
nu palnāḍu tālukāyilākā būdavāda gōgu
lapāḍu pedagārlapāṭilō ṣumāruku 2 ḷla yi
nāṁ bhūmi saṁpādiṁci samarpiṁcitimi ganuka yī
dharmaṁ Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānava dhariṁci daya
cāyavalenu . ślō lu . svadattā dviguṇaṁ pu
ṇyaṁ . paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārē
ṇa . svadattā niṣphalaṁ bhavēttulu . śrī śrī śrī
lakṣmīnārāyaṇa kumāruḍu rāmacaṁdru
ḍu subbayya kumāruḍu veṁkaṭa cannayya
mīrunnumī putra pautra pāraṁparyaṁ ta
raṁ yī dharmaṁ naḍipiṁcavalayunu
śrīrāṁdāsu perayācāri komāruḍu
yallamaṁdācāri vrālu = śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 40.48 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
